raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Justifying intended use of the referenced thing by normalizing its risk and shifting burden onto critics",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The thing in question carries no meaningful danger",
    "Every usable thing carries comparable danger",
    "Universal presence of danger invalidates objections to this specific use",
    "Continued or future use is therefore warranted"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Rhetorically coherent but logically weak: the parenthetical denial of danger clashes with the subsequent universalization of danger, creating an internal tension",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Risk levels of the thing must be comparable to ordinary accepted hazards and the behavioral commitment must align with actual net benefit or necessity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The thing must carry unique, disproportionate, or avoidable risks that the universal-danger claim conceals or trivializes"
}
